Rise of Air Tatva or Antara is a must for the birth to take
place. That means we got 3 choices.
1) Earth Tatva- Air Antara (Male)
2) Water Tatva- Air Antara (Female)
3) Fire Tatva- Air Antara. (Male)
For sure you are male. Therefore the 2nd choice gets
discarded. That means you are born either in Earth Tatva (i.e.
in air antara of it) or Fire Tatva (i.e. in air antara of it). The
span allotted for these Tatvas are:
Earth Tatva: 4 33 00 to 5 01 40 (AM)
Fire Tatva : 5 24 36 to 5 41 48 (AM)
Now let us calculate the Antaras in each of these Tatva
periods so that we could locate Air Antara period.

~B'~·n~h~~~im=e~R~e=ct~in=·ca=t'~·on~Ex=~=m~pl~e~(C~a=s~e~St=ud~1~·) ________________, 95
In Earth Tatva the Antaras are in the order : Earth, Water,
Fire, Air, Sky. Span for Earth Antara (in normal case)= (30/
90)x30 = 10 min
Span for Water Antara (in normal case)= (24/90) x 30 = 8
mm
